LocationPartValue.Value: Sultan Al Awal Street (Sheikh Sultan Bin Awal Road)
Near Mina Sea Port, Near Mina Khalid Road
P.O. Box 11256 Zinath Omar Kin Khatab
P.O. Box 6305 Zinath Omar Kin Khatab
Molla Gurani Mahallesi Sehit Pilot Nedim Sok. Evirgenler Ish

DistinctParty.Comment: Telephone: 6563184677; Fax: 6562243040; United States financial institutions are prohibited from making loans or providing credits totaling more than $10,000,000 in any 12-month period to the person listed here unless such person is engaged in activities to relieve human suffering and the loans or credits are provided for such activities

Telephone: 97165029999; Telephone: 97165280861; Telephone: 97165286666; Telephone: 97165283334; Telephone: 97165283323; Telephone: 97165022234; Telephone: 97165029999; Telephone: 97165029804; Telephone: 97165029914; Telephone: 97165029824; Telephone: 97165281737; Telephone: 97165029814; Telephone: 97165029825; Telephone: 97165029840; Telephone: 97165029863; Telephone: 97165029842; Telephone: 97165029819; Telephone: 97165029836; Telephone: 97168029939; Fax: 97165281437; Fax: 97165280861; United States financial institutions are prohibited from making loans or providing credits totaling more than $10,000,000 in any 12-month period to the person listed here unless such person is engaged in activities to relieve human suffering and the loans or credits are provided for such activities

Telephone: 861052925900; Fax: 861052025900; United States financial institutions are prohibited from making loans or providing credits totaling more than $10,000,000 in any 12-month period to the person listed here unless such person is engaged in activities to relieve human suffering and the loans or credits are provided for such activities

United States financial institutions are prohibited from opening or maintaining a correspondent account or a payable-through account for the foreign financial institution listed here, pursuant to 31 C.F.R. section 561.201(c)
